gen_ai_contents.ph_instructions_q: E.g., Generate multiple-choice questions based on the onboard manual, focusing on emergency procedures and highly plausible options.
gen_ai_contents.ph_instructions_m: E.g., Focus on maritime safety protocols, use clear technical terminology, and add a final summary section with key procedures.

Do not go back or close the page,
otherwise the generation will be lost.
gen_ai_contents.success_msg: Your material is ready to be consulted.
gen_ai_contents.modal_why_q: Why aren't all files selectable for AI generation?
gen_ai_contents.modal_why_desc1: To ensure educational integrity and technical accuracy of generated content, the platform applies a fundamental design rule:
gen_ai_contents.modal_why_li1_desc: The generation of questions and handouts must be based exclusively on official documentation, onboard manuals, or texts uploaded directly by teachers.
gen_ai_contents.modal_why_li2_desc: Materials already marked as AI-generated are intentionally excluded. This avoids recursive degradation and reduces cascading AI hallucination risks to zero.
gen_ai_contents.modal_why_desc2: You can find all your original files accessible and organized in folders, ready to be used as solid foundations for your tests.

mappe-concettuali.label: Mind Maps
mappe-concettuali.desc: Maps to visualize relationships between concepts

schematica.label: Schematic
schematica.desc: Only titles and key points, maximum synthesis

style_prefills.schematica: Make the slides extremely concise: maximum 3 very short points per slide, use noun phrases, eliminate any redundant explanation. Clarity matters more than completeness.
style_prefills.bilanciata: Structure each slide with a clear title and 3-4 distinct points. Each point must be self-contained and understandable, without being too long or too telegraphic. Adapt the language to the class level.
style_prefills.descrittiva: Develop each concept in depth: each point must include a contextualized explanation and, where possible, a concrete example or a connection to reality. Favor deep understanding over synthesis.

style_instructions.schematica: The slides must be schematic and telegraphic: maximum 3 short points per slide, noun phrases, no extended explanation.
style_instructions.descrittiva: The slides must be descriptive and in-depth: each point must contain complete and contextualized explanations, with examples where useful.
